summary: Comprehensive frontend testing completed successfully for ChurnGuard AI landing page with new spiral vortex logo and email signup section. All new features are working correctly and all previous functionality remains intact.

minor_issues.issue: CSS animation detection shows 'none' but Framer Motion transform animation is working correctly
minor_issues.impact: No functional impact - animation is visually working

minor_issues.issue: Error message text not easily detectable by automated tests but error styling is applied correctly
minor_issues.impact: No functional impact - validation works visually

passed_tests: New spiral vortex logo renders correctly in navbar with 5 blade elements and emerald gradients
Logo has Framer Motion animation with transform styles (rotation working)
Footer logo displays with larger spiral design and ambient effects (2 glow rings, 8 floating particles)
Email signup section displays correctly between Open Source and Final CTA sections
Email section has proper mail icon, input field with correct placeholder, and subscribe button
Email input has correct data-testid='email-input'
Submit button has correct data-testid='email-submit' and proper text 'Subscribe'
Email form validation works - error styling applied for invalid emails
Email form shows success styling after valid email submission
Email form uses mock API simulation with proper timing
Theme toggle button present and functional
All 4 GitHub buttons present and working
All 2 demo buttons present and working
All 4 navigation sections present (Features, How It Works, Models, Open Source)
Mobile responsive design working correctly
Mobile menu toggle present and functional
Logo visible and properly sized in mobile view
All previous features intact and working
Glass morphism effects working in email section
Emerald/teal color scheme properly implemented throughout
Favicon updated with spiral vortex design
success_percentage: Frontend: 95% (all major functionality working, minor test detection issues only)
